nodes.label: AI as informational search tool for procedural clarity

nodes.label: Efficiency and time saving

nodes.label: Understanding and knowledge acquisition
nodes.grounding_span: I don't know what I need to know, and I've got no processes in place so I'm starting from the ground up

nodes.label: Workplace role security and indispensability
nodes.grounding_span: My job isn't something that's going to be replaced by AI because my boss relies on me for anything technical or involving computers

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for procedural clarity

nodes.label: Selective avoidance of AI for routine tasks

nodes.label: Optimistic anticipation of AI as personal assistant

nodes.label: Process-based task segmentation — distinguishes familiar vs. unfamiliar domains
